programme.desc: A full recap of racing from Kilmore - Friday 13th February 2026.

programme.title: Racing To Win
programme.desc: Trackwork analysis and form discussion from leading trainers and jockeys throughout Hong Kong with expert race selections for the Saturday's Sha Tin race card.

programme.title: The Triple Trio
programme.desc: Jason Richardson, racing analyst Clint Hutchison and former champion jockey Shane Dye bring together leading experts and personalities to discuss the hugely popular sport of horse racing in Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Trial Show
programme.desc: In-depth look at trials and jump outs from across Victoria and South Australia.

programme.title: Get On Extra
programme.desc: Join Lizzie Jelfs, Matt Hill, Brent Zerafa and Simon Marshall as they take a light-hearted look at the weekend's racing.

programme.title: Get On
programme.desc: Get On previews the feature meeting and provides all the punting information from Racing.com's leading form analysts. From the favourites to the outsiders and some you need to forget, Get On has all the good form talk.

programme.title: The Analyser
programme.desc: Our form analysts preview Saturday's racing, going through every race on the card, with speed maps and replays to find you a winner.

programme.title: Get On SA
programme.desc: Tim Yeatman, John Kelton, Simon Marshall and Terry McAuliffe take a look at racing through a South Australian lens and preview all the big races.

programme.title: Get On
programme.desc: Get On previews the feature meeting and provides all the punting information from Racing.com's leading form analysts. From the favourites to the outsiders and some you need to forget, Get On has all the good form talk.

programme.desc: Our form analysts preview Saturday's racing, going through every race on the card, with speed maps and replays to find you a winner.

programme.title: Foxcatcher: On the Hunt
programme.desc: Jules Vallance and Nic Ashman provide their cutting-edge insight and preview a big weekend of racing.

programme.title: LIVE: Get On Now
programme.desc: Join Matt Nevett, Dave Strehlau and Nick Foot every Saturday morning for the most up-to-date information, analysis and tips ahead of race-day.

programme.title: LIVE: Get On Now
programme.desc: Join Matt Nevett, Dave Strehlau and Nick Foot every Saturday morning for the most up-to-date information, analysis and tips ahead of race-day.

programme.desc: Our form analysts preview Saturday's racing, going through every race on the card, with speed maps and replays to find you a winner.

programme.title: LIVE: Before The First
programme.desc: Join Racing.com's leading analysts for a comprehensive preview to the day's racing on 'Before The First'.

programme.title: Live: Flem/Ball/Morph/Pinj/Sha Tin/NZ
programme.desc: Victorian racing from Flemington (G1 Black Caviar Lightning) and Ballarat. S.A. racing from Gawler. W.A. racing from Pinjarra. New Zealand racing from Matamata. Hong Kong racing from Sha Tin.

programme.title: Champions - Black Caviar Pt 1
programme.desc: Wins 1 - 6. Black Caviar, Australia's sprinting champion race mare, trained by Peter Moody. Undefeated in 25 races including 15 Group 1 victories. Aust. Racehorse of the Year (2011, 2012, 2013), Aust. Champion Sprinter (2011, 2012, 2013).

programme.title: Raceday Review - Flemington
programme.desc: A full recap of racing from Lightning Stakes Day, Flemington - Saturday 14th February 2026.

programme.title: Champions - Makybe Diva
programme.desc: Makybe Diva, Australian Racehorse of the Year (2005, 2006) Australian Champion Stayer (2004, 2005, 2006) Australian Champion Filly and Mare (2005). Over $14M in prize money, 3 Melbourne Cups, nothing more to say - enjoy watching her run!

programme.title: Champions - Northerly
programme.desc: Northerly, seen as one of Australia's best middle distance thoroughbred horses of the early 2000s. Australian Middle Distance Champion (2002, 2003) Australian Champion Racehorse of the Year (2003). 9 Group 1 wins, over $9M in prize money.

programme.title: Champions - So You Think
programme.desc: So You Think came to champion status through back-to-back wins in the Cox Plate (2009 and 2010), trained by the legendary Bart Cummings. Australian Champion Three Year Old (2010). 10 Group 1 wins, over $10M in prize money.

programme.title: Live: Giddy Up
programme.desc: Racing expert Gareth Hall hits the airwaves for SENTrack with a fast-paced show that will set the day's race news agenda plus form analysis with all the winning info.

programme.title: Live: Giddy Up
programme.desc: Racing expert Gareth Hall hits the airwaves for SENTrack with a fast-paced show that will set the day's race news agenda plus form analysis with all the winning info.

programme.title: Grassroots
programme.desc: Sam Doran and Adam Olszanski explore racing's grassroots stories that make the industry tick.

programme.title: Champions - Makybe Diva
programme.desc: Makybe Diva, Australian Racehorse of the Year (2005, 2006) Australian Champion Stayer (2004, 2005, 2006) Australian Champion Filly and Mare (2005). Over $14M in prize money, 3 Melbourne Cups, nothing more to say - enjoy watching her run!

programme.title: Live: Kingscote/Gerald/Pakenham
programme.desc: South Australian thoroughbred racing from Kingscote, Kangaroo Island. Western Australian thoroughbred racing from Geraldton. Victorian thoroughbred night racing from Pakenham.

programme.title: Live: Kingscote/Gerald/Pakenham
programme.desc: South Australian thoroughbred racing from Kingscote, Kangaroo Island. Western Australian thoroughbred racing from Geraldton. Victorian thoroughbred night racing from Pakenham.

programme.title: Racing Live: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Hong Kong thoroughbred racing from Happy Valley Hong Kong.

programme.title: Champions - Testa Rossa
programme.desc: Testa Rossa - Winner of six Group 1 races as a 2, 3 and 4 year old from 1000m to 1600m. Known for great battles with Redoute's Choice, he's one of the most decorated Sires of recent years producing Intl. stars such as Ortensia.

programme.title: Get On
programme.desc: Get On previews the feature meeting and provides all the punting information from Racing.com's leading form analysts. From the favourites to the outsiders and some you need to forget, Get On has all the good form talk.

programme.title: Get On SA
programme.desc: Tim Yeatman, John Kelton, Simon Marshall and Terry McAuliffe take a look at racing through a South Australian lens and preview all the big races.

programme.title: Foxcatcher: On the Hunt
programme.desc: Jules Vallance and Nic Ashman provide their cutting-edge insight and preview a big weekend of racing.

programme.title: Flashback - Blue Diamond Stakes
programme.desc: We relive the great editions of the Blue Diamond Stakes.

programme.title: Foxcatcher: On the Hunt
programme.desc: Jules Vallance and Nic Ashman provide their cutting-edge insight and preview a big weekend of racing.

programme.title: Get On SA
programme.desc: Tim Yeatman, John Kelton, Simon Marshall and Terry McAuliffe take a look at racing through a South Australian lens and preview all the big races.

programme.title: Get On
programme.desc: Get On previews the feature meeting and provides all the punting information from Racing.com's leading form analysts. From the favourites to the outsiders and some you need to forget, Get On has all the good form talk.

programme.title: The Trial Show
programme.desc: In-depth look at trials and jump outs from across Victoria and South Australia.

programme.title: Live: Giddy Up
programme.desc: Racing expert Gareth Hall hits the airwaves for SENTrack with a fast-paced show that will set the day's race news agenda plus form analysis with all the winning info.

programme.title: Live: Giddy Up
programme.desc: Racing expert Gareth Hall hits the airwaves for SENTrack with a fast-paced show that will set the day's race news agenda plus form analysis with all the winning info.

programme.title: Grassroots
programme.desc: Sam Doran and Adam Olszanski explore racing's grassroots stories that make the industry tick.

programme.title: Racing Live: Seymour/Terang/Esperance
programme.desc: Victorian thoroughbred racing from Seymour and Terang. Western Australian thoroughbred racing from Esperance.

programme.title: Racenight Live: Cranbourne/Launceston
programme.desc: Victorian thoroughbred night racing from The Valley @ Cranbourne. Tasmanian thoroughbred night racing from Launceston featuring the Tasmanian Oaks.

programme.title: Racenight Live: Cranbourne/Launceston
programme.desc: Victorian thoroughbred night racing from The Valley @ Cranbourne. Tasmanian thoroughbred night racing from Launceston featuring the Tasmanian Oaks.

programme.title: The Analyser
programme.desc: Our form analysts preview Saturday's racing, going through every race on the card, with speed maps and replays to find you a winner.

programme.title: Get On Extra
programme.desc: Join Lizzie Jelfs, Matt Hill, Brent Zerafa and Simon Marshall as they take a light-hearted look at the weekend's racing.

programme.desc: AFL Origin is back! Relieve some of the best games in AFL Origin history before Victoria and West Australia reignite the rivalry on February 14.

programme.desc: AFL Origin is back! Relieve some of the best games in AFL Origin history before Victoria and West Australia reignite the rivalry on February 14.

programme.title: AFL: SF ADE v HAW
programme.desc: Semi Final: A preliminary final awaits the winner as the minor premiers get a second chance against the Hollywood Hawks who are full of confidence from a big away win.

programme.title: AFL: SF BRI v GC
programme.desc: Semi Final: The Lions and the Suns face off in the biggest QClash in history - the winner to face Collingwood in a Preliminary Final.

programme.desc: Two of the league's biggest rivals fight for a place in the 2025 AFL Grand Final.

programme.desc: The MCG gets its first taste of AFL action in 2025 with the youthful Tigers hosting the Blues.

programme.desc: Two of the competition's fiercest rivals meet in a Round 1 Friday night blockbuster.

programme.title: AFL: Round 1 Geelong v Fremantle
programme.desc: After a nightmare end to 2024, the Dockers head east for one of footy's toughest tasks-facing a consistent Cats side who have been bolstered yet again.

programme.title: AFL: Round 1 Sydney v Brisbane
programme.desc: Super Saturday continues as Brisbane begin their Premiership defence with a Grand Final rematch at the SCG.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 CAR v COL
programme.desc: Historic rivals Carlton and Collingwood will open the AFLW's 10th season on Thursday night at IKON Park in a repeat of the iconic inaugural match in 2017.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 WC v GC
programme.desc: West Coast will host Gold Coast in Perth on Thursday night to kick off the 2025 AFLW season under lights.

programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.

programme.title: AFL Practice Match: Hawthorn v Geelong
programme.desc: The Hawks and Cats face off in the first scratch match of the new year.

programme.title: AFL: R1 WB v NM
programme.desc: An undermanned Dogs side face the Kangaroos in round 1 of the 2025 season.

programme.title: AFL: Round 1 Collingwood v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: After crossing to the Magpies from the Power at the end of 2024, Dan Houston now faces his old team for the first time.

programme.title: AFL: Round 1 Adelaide v St Kilda
programme.desc: The Crows and the Saints kick off their 2025 campaign.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 SYD v RIC
programme.desc: A Friday night showdown between Sydney and last year's finalists Richmond awaits at North Sydney Oval in Round 1 AFLW action.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 GWS v ESS
programme.desc: The first ever clash between GWS and Essendon kicks off Round 1 of the AFLW season in Canberra on Saturday afternoon.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 WB v MEL
programme.desc: The Hampson-Hardeman Cup returns to the AFLW as the Western Bulldogs and Melbourne go head-to-head to kick off a new season.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 1 BRI v HAW
programme.desc: A mouthwatering AFLW opening round battle as rivals and premiership contenders Brisbane and Hawthorn go head-to-head on Sunday afternoon in Springfield.

programme.title: AFL: Grand Final Geelong v Brisbane
programme.desc: Geelong and Brisbane face off for the 2025 Premiership.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 2024 GF SYD v BRI
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Anthony Stevens
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.
